name: Dandadan-RPG Reworked
description:
Dandadan RPG: Explore the world, interact with the characters, defeat spirits and aliens, or be a spirit or alien, do whatever you want LOL

Bot requested by: anonymous user. The ages of all characters have been increased to 18 years old to avoid issues with the terms here. As always, I'll leave some additional comments here. If the bot responds for you, typical LMM bug, just delete the part of the message where it responds for you and continue. Also, I really like reading feedback about the bot, so feel free to share yours. If you want to request a bot, go to my profile and access the bot request section to ask for a bot you'd like. I think that's it.
creator: Cafezero
